107 SCULLERY

@f

KITCHEN

IMAGES: DHC-LOGO.png RSI-BLK-LOGO.png

»197142-ELEC EQUIP

USER: monaya

¥197142-BASEPLAN

hian Depot, VA\Mechonical\197142—M2.0.dwg x197142-RCP PLAN

XREFS: x197142-TBLK-M

DWG: S: \clients\197-RSI Group\197-142-DHC, Mi Sep 23, 2025 12:02pm

DATE:

C01 10'-0"

101 DINING

+€)

> >

Gy

Is

‘©

5/4" U/C +48" AFF MIN

RESTROOM

@y)

ALL GREASE EXHAUST DUCTWORK SHALL BE DOUBLE-WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT FOR USE WITH TYPE | KITCHEN HOOD THAT CONFORMS TO THE REQUIREMENTS OF NFPA-96. PRODUCT SHALL BE ETL LISTED TO UL-1978 & UL-2221.

ANY CHANGES MADE TO THE DESIGN IDENTIFIED ON THESE DRAWINGS AND/OR ASSOCIATED SPECIFICATIONS SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO THE ENGINEER/ARCHITECT OF RECORD FOR REVIEW AND APPROVAL PRIOR TO MAKING ANY MODIFICATIONS TO THE PROJECT. ANY LIABILITY AS A RESULT OF DESIGN MODIFICATIONS, AS WELL AS ANY COST ASSOCIATED WITH SUCH MODIFICATIONS, MADE WITHOUT THE WRITTEN APPROVAL OF THE ENGINEER/ARCHITECT OF RECORD SHALL BECOME THE RESPONSIBILITY OF THE CONTRACTOR.

PROVIDE MANUAL VOLUME DAMPERS AT ALL BRANCH DUCTS. PROVIDE CABLE/ ELECTRONIC VOLUME DAMPERS AT ALL IN-ACCESSABLE CEILING LOCATIONS.

DUCT DIMENSIONS ON PLAN ARE SHEET METAL SIZE. ALL CEILING DIFFUSER AND RETURN AIR REGISTER CEILING BOXES SHALL BE OF SUFFICIENT HEIGHT TO PERMIT SIDE INLET DUCT CONNECTIONS WHEN ATTACHED TO BRANCH DUCTS, OR FULL SIZE VERTICAL

PLENUMS WHEN CONNECTED DIRECTLY OFF BOTTOM OF SA OR RA MAINS. SUCH CEILING BOXES AND

VERTICAL PLENUMS SHALL BE LINED W/ 1" THICK NFBU RATED DUCT LINER WITH FLAT BLACK FACING. CONNECTION TO SIDEWALL SUPPLY REGISTERS SHALL BE MADE WITH FULL SIZE HORIZONTAL PLENUM EXTENSIONS FROM MAIN SUPPLY DUCT, LINED OR WRAPPED AT CONTRACTORS OPTION

CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE ALL CONTROL ACCESSORIES AND COORDINATE WITH ALL TRADES AND PROVIDE MINIMUM CLEARANCE FOR ALL EQUIPMENT.

CONTRACTOR TO VERIFY ALL EXISTING CONDITIONS BEFORE START OF ANY WORK. CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE NECESSARY CONTROL DEVICES TO ENSURE THE SYSTEM FUNCTIONS PROPERLY. FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT SHALL BE PROVIDED BY KEC AND INSTALLED BY MECHANICAL CONTRACTOR.

. IF EXISTING DUCTWORK IS REUSED, CONTRACTOR SHALL INCLUDE PRICING TO PROFESSIONALLY CLEAN THE

DUCT SYSTEM AS PART OF THEIR BASE BID.

. HOOD HAS MINIMUM OF 6” OVERHANG ALL AROUND COOKING EQUIPMENT. . PROVIDE CLEAR THERMOSTAT LOCKABLE BOX. . REMOTE TEST INDICATORS (RTI) FOR SMOKE DETECTOR. LABEL CLEARLY MATCHING THE UNIT ITS BEING

SERVED NEXT TO ITS THERMOSTAT.

18"@ STAINLESS STEEL DOUBLE WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT INTO HOOD (2,800 CFM @ 1,584 FPM)

STAINLESS STEEL DOUBLE-WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT. THE SLOPE OF THE HORIZONTAL DUCT SHALL NOT BE LESS THAN THE MANUFACTURER'S INSTALLATION INSTRUCTION (SLOPE SHALL BE 1/16" PER LINEAR FOOT FOR HORIZONTAL DUCT RUN LESS THAN 75’, AND 3/16” PER LINEAR FOOT FOR

HORIZONTAL DUCT RUN MORE THAN 75': PER CAPTIVEAIRE DOUBLE WALL GREASE EXHAUST AIR DUCT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTION) TOWARD THE HOOD OR TOWARD THE APPROVED GREASE RESERVOIR.

CLEAN-OUT ACCESS DOORS AT EVERY 12'-0" 0.C. AND AT EACH CHANGE OF DIRECTION FOR ALL HORIZONTAL GREASE DUCT.

18°@ STAINLESS STEEL DOUBLE WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT UP TO ROOF (2,800 CFM @ 1,584 FPM) - SEE M3.0 FOR CONTINUATION.

SUPPLY AND RETURN AIR DUCT AND UP TO RTU-1 - SEE M3.0 FOR CONTINUATION. SUPPLY AND RETURN AIR DUCT AND UP TO DOAS-1 - SEE M3.0 FOR CONTINUATION.

4"9 RESTROOM EXHAUST AIR DUCT UP TO ROOF TERMINATE WITH FACTORY ROOF CAP (80 CFM) - SEE M3.0 FOR CONTINUATION.

NO DUCTS AND PIPING TO RUN ABOVE ELECTRICAL PANELS AND TRANSFORMERS PER NEC REQUIREMENTS, SEE CONSTRICTION NOTE #42 ON MI1.0.

PROVIDE REMOTE TEST INDICATORS (RTI) FOR SMOKE DETECTOR NEXT TO ITS THERMOSTAT. LABEL CLEARLY MATCHING THE UNIT ITS BEING SERVED.

THERMOSTAT SHALL BE HONEYWELL 110+. THERMOSTAT SHALL BE PRE-SET AT 72°F AND THE AC SHALL OPERATE FROM 10AM TO 12AM. PROVIDE WITH CLEAR PLASTIC THERMOSTAT COVER.

ALL EXPOSED DUCT IN DINING AREA SHALL BE PAINTED PER ARCHITECTURE DRAWINGS.

RSI GROUP

RSI

3199 AIRPORT LOOP DR. SUITE D COSTA MESA, CA 92626 714.966.9400 WWW. rsi-group.com

Kya SPHATCHARAKITTI i} Lic. No. 0402065627

SANYA PHATCHARAKITTI, License #0402065627 Expiration Date: 09/30/2026

ENGINEERING

17151 NEWHOPE STREET, SUITE 108 FOUNTAIN VALLEY, CALIFORNIA 92708 PHONE: 714-847-7100 WWW.CROEG.COM

DO NOT SCALE DRAWINGS CONTRACTOR TO

VERIFY ALL EXISTING CONDITIONS AND.

DIMENSIONS - NOTIFY ARCHITECT OF ANY

DISCREPANCIES PRIOR TO BEGINNING CONSTRUCTION

PROJECT NAME:

MIDLOTHIAN, VA 23223

DHC MIDLOTHIAN MIDLOTHIAN TURNPIKE & ALVERSER DRIVE

ISSUE DATE:

90% REVIEW - 09/05/2025

ISSUED FOR PERMIT - 09/23/2025

MECHANICAL FLOOR PLAN

M2.0

DATE OF PRINTING -
